title: Plaque PCR
steps: Mark independent plaques on the back of the Petri dish with a black pen. Take 6 points in a plate and try to take points randomly and evenly.
Take 24 1.5 ml EP tubes. A) Add 200 μl SM Buffer per tube B) Add 2 μl chloroform to each tube
Suck out the plaque just spotted with the pipette
Put into the prepared EP tube.
Open the metal bath to 95 degrees for lysis of the phage
Place the EP tube at room temperature for one hour to dissolve the sample sufficiently and mix several times during the period.
Add 18.4 μl to each tube (1.6 μl template is needed)
After an hour, put the EP tube in a metal bath and heat it for 10 minutes.
Take 1.6ul supernatant from EP tube and add it to new EP tube.
Centrifuge the EP tube briefly with a centrifuge.
creator: Jiaxin Li
